job.title: Full Stack Senior Developer @ iManage (KA, IN)
job.description:
*We offer a flexible working policy that supports a healthy balance between personal and professional well-being. This role requires in-office presence on Tuesdays & Thursdays to collaborate, connect, and learn from peers - while also maintaining the flexibility for meaningful work-life balance.*  
  
**Being a Full Stack Senior Developer at iManage means…**

You are a passionate Full Stack engineer, first and foremost — someone with strong engineering fundamentals who is deeply productive in — or ready to go deep on — TypeScript, Node.js, and React. You take end-to-end ownership of features: from intuitive user interfaces to scalable backend services. You write reusable, robust, and maintainable code and embrace Test-Driven Development to deliver high-quality, cloud-ready software.  
  
You are fluent in AI-native, agentic software development — pairing with coding agents like Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, etc., as force multipliers, practicing spec-driven development, and applying the same rigor to agent-generated code as to any human PR. You are curious about emerging technology trends, especially agentic workflows, generative AI, and modern automation frameworks, and you bring that curiosity into the solutions you design.  
  
**iM Responsible For…**  

* Designing and building highly scalable, performant full-stack applications using Node.js and TypeScript, ready for cloud deployment.
* Accelerating delivery through agentic development practices — decomposing features into well-scoped, agent-executable tasks, providing agents the right context, and rigorously reviewing and validating their output before merge.
* Writing resilient, maintainable backend services backed by relational databases.
* Implementing high-traffic web applications from designs provided by the UX team, using ReactJS and NextJS.
* Developing and maintaining comprehensive test suites using Jest and Playwright.
* Participating in Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.
* Owning a product module and driving it through the full development lifecycle, collaborating with cross-functional engineering teams, product managers, and UX designers.
* Staying current with industry trends — particularly automation, AI, and workflow orchestration — and influencing improvements to the technology stack.

  
**iM Qualified Because I Have…**  

* 5+ years of experience building high-performance, resilient backend services in any modern language (e.g., TypeScript/Node.js, Go, Java, Python, C#) — with the aptitude and willingness to work primarily in TypeScript.
* A track record of learning new languages, frameworks, and paradigms quickly — we value engineering excellence over any specific stack.
* Strong frontend development skills with React or a comparable modern framework; production experience with ReactJS/NextJS and TypeScript is a plus.
* Proficiency with relational databases and data modeling.
* Strong understanding of OAuth2/OIDC authentication flows.
* Excellent understanding of object-oriented programming and design principles.
* Practical experience with modern build and tooling ecosystems (Git, plus bundlers/package managers such as Webpack, Vite, or NPM/pnpm).
* Hands-on experience in automated testing — unit, integration, and end-to-end (Jest and Playwright, or equivalents like Vitest or Cypress).
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, and Argo CD.
* Experience with monitoring tools such as Prometheus and Grafana.
* Knowledge of the message broker pattern, using at least one message queuing service.

  
**iM Getting To…**  

* Join a rapidly evolving, industry-leading SaaS company on an exciting journey of growth and scalability!
* Take on meaningful, high-impact challenges by leveraging cutting-edge technologies and best-in-class protocols to drive innovation.
* Own my career path with our internal development framework. Ask us more about this!
* Expand my skill set and earn certifications with unlimited access to LinkedIn Learning courses and interactive Microsoft courses & training.
* Be part of a supportive and experienced team within a dynamic, inclusive, and encouraging culture.
* Enjoy flexible work hours that empower me to balance personal time with professional commitments.
* Collaborate in a modern, open-plan workspace featuring a gaming area, free snacks and drinks, and regular social events.

  
**iManage Is Supporting Me By...**

* Creating an inclusive environment where you’re encouraged to help shape the culture by bringing your unique perspective, not just by fitting in.
* Providing a market leading salary determined through a fair and consistent process, equitable for all our employees, and regularly reviewed against industry benchmarks.
* Rewarding me with an annual performance-based bonus.
* Providing enhanced parental leave (20 weeks for primary and 10 weeks for secondary caregiver at 100% pay)
* Offering comprehensive Health/Accidental /Life Insurance.
* Encouraging me to make use of our top-tier flexible time off policy, which includes 21 paid leaves, 9 casual and sick, close to 10-12 Indian Holidays, and for other life events.
* Having multiple company wellness days each year to prioritize mental health and well-being.
* Providing access to RethinkCare, a global behavioral health platform that enhances personal well-being, strengthens professional resilience, and empowers parental success through expert-led training and resources.

**About iManage…**
==================

At iManage, we are dedicated to Making Knowledge Work™. Our intelligent, cloud-enabled, and secure platform is trusted by 4,100+ customers and 430,000 users worldwide, managing over 11 billion documents and 11 petabytes of data. We empower professionals across 65+ countries to unlock the full potential of their business content and communications. We are continuously innovating to solve the most complex professional challenges and enable better business outcomes; Our work is not always easy but it is ambitious and rewarding.

So we’re looking for people who embrace challenges. People who thrive on solving problems, pushing boundaries, and collaborating with the industry’s best and brightest. That’s the iManage way. It’s how we turn the impossible into reality, empower our employees to grow, unlock their potential, and create a meaningful impact on everything we do.

***Whoever you are, whatever you do, however you work. Make it mean something at iManage.***

iManage provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by the Law.

This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.

Learn more at: www.imanage.com

Please see our privacy statement for more information on how we handle your personal data: https://imanage.com/privacy-policy/

job.title: Senior Java Full stack developer (Mobile development, AWS) @ Broadridge (KA, IN)
job.description:
At Broadridge, we've built a culture where the highest goal is to empower others to accomplish more. If you’re passionate about developing your career, while helping others along the way, come join the Broadridge team.

1. 2 - 6 years of hand-on experience in Software Web Development using Java/J2EE technologies.  
2. Experience in Mobile UI Development using HTML, CSS, Angular, Type Script, Android Studio and Android SDK  
3. Experience in building micro services with Spring boot / Spring framework  
4. Exposure using Frontend/Backend development frameworks like ReactJS, Node.js.  
5. Hands-on experience in one of the RDBMS – Oracle(Preferable). Experience in writing PL/SQL code is must.  
6. Hands on development experience in AWS/Cloud programing with be a plus.  
7. Exposure to build tool like ANT, Gradel and MAVEN is added advantage.  
8. Person should have worked in Agile Environment  
9 Experience in dealing with clients on a verbal and written basis
  
10. Willingness to work in rotational shifts on the need basis  
11. Excellent communication and written skills and should be a team player  
12. Highly proactive, aggressive & self-motivated individual.  
13. Education: BE / B.Tech / MCA or equivalent is needed  
14. Location : Bangalore/Hyderabad

We are dedicated to fostering a collaborative, engaging, and inclusive environment and are committed to providing a workplace that empowers associates to be authentic and bring their best to work. We believe that associates do their best when they feel safe, understood, and valued, and we work diligently and collaboratively to ensure Broadridge is a company—and ultimately a community—that recognizes and celebrates everyone’s unique perspective.

**Use of AI in Hiring**

As part of the recruiting process, Broadridge may use technology, including artificial intelligence (AI)-based tools, to help review and evaluate applications. These tools are used only to support our recruiters and hiring managers, and all employment decisions include human review to ensure fairness, accuracy, and compliance with applicable laws. Please note that honesty and transparency are critical to our hiring process. Any attempt to falsify, misrepresent, or disguise information in an application, resume, assessment, or interview will result in disqualification from consideration.

job.title: Senior Software Engineer @ ConnectWise (Remote, IN)
job.description:
*ConnectWise is an industry and Global leading software company* *with over 3,000 colleagues in North America, EMEA and APAC. As a community-driven software company dedicated to the success of technology solution providers, our suite helps* *over 45,000 of our partners manage their businesses better, sell more efficiently, automate service delivery, and remotely control technology so they can consistently deliver amazing customer experiences.*

*Our company is powered by our connections, our colleagues, and our community. And, we accept all kinds.*

*Game-changers, innovators, culture-lovers—and humankind.*

*We invite discovery and debate. We recognize key moments as milestones.*

*We see you and value you for your unique contributions. Our inclusive, positive culture lays the foundation to ensure every colleague is valued for their perspectives and skills, giving you the choice of how YOU make a difference.*

**Curious? Read this opportunity to learn how YOU can make a difference at ConnectWise!**

**About the Role**
------------------

You will be a senior engineer on the x360Sync team at ConnectWise, owning development of the macOS agent — a native desktop application at the heart of the x360Sync backup and file sync product. The application is primarily written in C++, with Swift and Objective-C used for macOS-native components. You will be stepping into a mature codebase with real ownership and scope from day one.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Design, implement, and maintain features in the x360Sync macOS agent, working primarily in C++ with Swift and Objective-C for platform-native integrations

* Debug and resolve production issues, including deep-dive investigation across the application stack and macOS system APIs

* Participate in architecture and design discussions, contributing technical recommendations grounded in macOS platform best practices

* Write clean, well-tested code and take part in code reviews — both giving and receiving constructive feedback

* Collaborate with product managers, QA engineers, and cross-functional teams to deliver features on schedule without cutting corners on quality

* Contribute to improving engineering standards, internal tooling, and development processes

* Help scope and break down complex problems into well-defined tasks for yourself and the broader team

* Document technical decisions, system behavior, and processes clearly for teammates and future contributors

**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------

### **Technical**

* Solid professional experience writing C++ in a production environment

* Strong working knowledge of macOS internals, frameworks, and platform APIs (e.g. NSFileProvider, FSEvents)

* Proficiency in Swift and/or Objective-C for macOS-native development

* Experience debugging complex, multi-threaded, or multi-process applications

* Experience with software development workflows, including version control (Git), code review, and CI/CD pipelines

### **Non-Technical**

* Strong written and verbal English communication skills — you'll work with distributed teams and will need to articulate technical ideas clearly

* Ability to work independently and manage your own priorities in a remote or hybrid environment

* Comfortable working in an established codebase with existing design decisions you didn't author

**Nice-to-Have Qualifications**
-------------------------------

* Experience with file sync, backup, or storage-related products

* Familiarity with Windows desktop development (the x360Sync agent also has a Windows counterpart)

* Exposure to cross-platform C++ codebases targeting both macOS and Windows

* Experience working in an Agile/Scrum team environment

* Background in developer tooling, performance profiling, or low-level system programming on macOS

**Why Join the x360Sync Team**
------------------------------

The x360Sync team works on software that businesses genuinely depend on — keeping their files safe and in sync. You won't be building another internal dashboard; your work ships to real customers and has a clear, direct impact. The team values technical rigor, honest communication, and getting things done without unnecessary ceremony. If you enjoy owning hard problems in a native desktop environment and want your expertise in C++ and macOS to be the main event rather than a footnote, this is the role for you.

The Senior Software Engineer for x360Sync is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining the macOS desktop agent application that keeps critical business data in sync for thousands of customers. Working in C++, Swift, and Objective-C, you will collaborate closely with a cross-functional engineering team to deliver reliable, high-quality software — from feature development through to production support. This role requires strong technical depth, clear communication, and a genuine care for the end-user experience.

***ConnectWise is an Equal Opportunity Employer, dedicated to building a diverse and inclusive workforce and providing a workplace free from discrimination and harassment. ConnectWise provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants without regard to race, ethnicity, color, religion, age, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender,*** ***gender identity or expression, ancestry, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, genetic information, military/veteran status, marital status, familial or parental status, or any other characteristic or status protected by applicable federal, state and local laws.***

***The statements above are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by individuals assigned to this job. Other duties may be assigned as needed. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable qualified individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions of the job and/or to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, please contact us at*** ***talentacquisition@connectwise.com*** ***or 1-800-671-6898.***

job.title: Senior Team Center Developer @ Qualcomm (TS, IN)
job.description:
**Company:**
------------

Qualcomm India Private Limited

**Job Area:**
-------------

Information Technology Group, Information Technology Group > IT Software Developer

**General Summary:**

'Role is for a Java Developer with 5-7 years of development experience skilled in Core Java, J2EE, Spring, Angular, JMS, Web Services, Kubernetes, and AWS. Must have experience with Siemens Teamcenter PLM and a basic understanding of AI-driven solutions. Need Strong Java/J2EE development skills, Front-end expertise with Angular, Cloud & containerization (AWS, Kubernetes), PLM integration experience and ability to work independently post-design phase. The developer must exhibit a wide variety of professional characteristics such as debugging, problem solving, and excellent interpersonal skills.

* Experience with Core Java, Spring Framework, XML/JSON, Web Services and Angular JS is a **must along with Siemens Team Center experience**
* 5-7 years of extensive experience in development and testing of Java based applications using Java technologies (JDBC, JMS, WEBSERVICES)
* Experience with build tools such as MAVEN3, Gradle and development environments and IDE's (Eclipse)
* Experience with GIT / Source Code Versioning
* Experience with Relational Database
* Experience with unit testing tools and frameworks such as JUnit/Mockito etc.
* A quick learner with the ability to handle development tasks with minimum or no supervision
* Should have the ability to work and contribute beyond defined responsibilities

\* Excellent communication/inter-personal skills a must

**Minimum Qualifications:**

* 3+ years of IT-relevant work experience with a Bachelor's degree in a technical field (e.g., Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems).

OR
  
5+ years of IT-relevant work experience without a Bachelor’s degree.
  
  

* 3+ years of any combination of academic or work experience with Full-stack Application Development (e.g., Java, Python, JavaScript, etc.)
* 1+ year of any combination of academic or work experience with Data Structures, algorithms, and data stores.

job.title: Sr. Software Engineer @ Applied Systems India Private Limited (KA, IN)
job.description:
External Job Ad:

**Amazing Career Moments Happen Here**

Transforming the insurance industry is ambitious, we know. That’s why at Applied Systems India Pvt Ltd., an Applied Systems company, we’re building a team that shows up every day ready to learn, willing to try new things, and driven to deliver innovative software and services that make us indispensable to our customers – all within a culture built on values that make us indispensable to each other too. With 40+ years of experience in the Insurtech game, we’re not just redefining what’s achievable, we’re creating a place where amazing career moments are made possible.

**Position Overview**

We’re searching for a **Senior Software Engineer** to join our **Engineering team** in Bengaluru location. This role is purpose-built around an AI-first engineering mindset – you will leverage AI tools and AI SDLC best practices across the entire product development lifecycle to accelerate delivery, elevate code quality, and drive innovation. You’ll be a full-stack engineer at heart, writing production-grade code in .NET and React while championing a quality-first development culture. This role bridges product engineering and quality engineering — you'll build features and own their quality end-to-end. To keep us headed in the right direction, we’re looking for people who understand winning is a team sport, who value and seek to learn from our team’s diverse experiences and backgrounds, who welcome a challenge and take risks in the pursuit of creating better outcomes for our customers, and who can, at any given time, step back to laugh and have some fun.

**Required Skills:**

* Education: BE, B. Tech, M. Tech Only
* Experience Level: 5+ Years of hands-on software engineering experience

**Mandatory Skills (Full-Stack + Quality & Product Engineering)**

* Strong proficiency in .NET framework (C#, ASP.NET, .NET Core) for backend development.
* Proficiency with ReactJS and related ecosystem (Redux, React Router, hooks, context API).
* Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript/TypeScript.
* Proficiency with microservice architecture, event-driven programming, and async design patterns.
* Hands-on experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs.
* Solid experience with relational databases such as SQL Server, MySQL, or PostgreSQL.
* Demonstrated quality-first mindset: experience writing unit tests, integration tests, and automated test suites as part of the development workflow. Ability to own quality end-to-end, not just hand off to QA.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and embedding automated quality gates (linting, static analysis, test coverage thresholds).
* Strong understanding of quality management principles — defect prevention, root cause analysis, test planning, and quality metrics tracking across the product engineering lifecycle.
* Hands-on experience with quality engineering practices: test automation frameworks, performance/load testing, API contract testing, and shift-left testing strategies to catch defects early in the SDLC.
* Proven ability to use AI-powered development tools (e.g., Claude, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, AI code-review/test-generation tools) to accelerate and improve the SDLC.
* Strong troubleshooting, debugging, and research abilities.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team-oriented environment.
* Strong work ethic and ability to deliver solutions within committed timeframes.

**What You’ll Do**

* Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications using .NET (C#, ASP.NET Core) for backend and ReactJS for frontend development.
* Integrate and champion AI-powered development tools (e.g., Claude, GitHub Copilot, AI code-review assistants, AI test generators) across the SDLC to boost team velocity and code quality.
* Utilize and enforce AI SDLC best practices – from AI-assisted requirements analysis and design through AI-augmented testing, deployment, and monitoring.
* Drive a quality-first development culture: author comprehensive unit, integration, and end-to-end tests; embed automated quality gates in CI/CD pipelines.
* Work on all phases of the development lifecycle, including requirement gathering, analysis, design, coding, testing, and deployment.
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, QA engineers, and fellow developers to deliver high-quality software solutions on time.
* Architect and build microservice-based, event-driven systems with async design patterns for scale and resilience.
* Ensure code quality by writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code. Conduct and participate in code reviews, providing constructive feedback to peers.
* Prepare and maintain technical documentation for code, architecture decisions, and design patterns.
* Mentor junior engineers on AI tool adoption, testing strategies, and full-stack best practices.
* Stay updated with emerging AI/ML tools, frameworks, and industry trends to continuously improve engineering practices.

**You may have other skills, including**

Experience with the following technologies a plus

* Experience with AWS cloud services (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, ECS/EKS, CloudWatch).
* Experience with containerization and orchestration tools – Docker & Kubernetes.
* Familiarity with GitLab CI/CD, Apigee API management, and Tilt for local development workflows.
* Experience with observability platforms such as Datadog or similar.
* Knowledge of AI/ML frameworks or platforms and their application in software engineering workflows.
* Experience with infrastructure-as-code or cloud-native development patterns.

**When You Join Team Applied, You Can Expect:**

**A culture that values who you are** and recognizes that you aren’t just an employee; you are a teammate, and you matter. We thrive on the benefits of our different experiences and celebrate the uniqueness our teammates bring to work with them every day.

**We flex our time together**, collaborating remotely and in-person to empower our teams to work in the ways that work best for them.

**Learn more about the people behind our products at** –

* LinkedIn Page Applied Systems India
* https://www1.appliedsystems.com/en-us/about-us/jobs/

**Your Security Matters:**  
Our candidates’ personal information and online safety are top of mind for us. At Applied, we proactively protect your personal information and only communicate with candidates via a secure @appliedsystems.com email or through our official careers’ portal.

**EEO Statement**

Applied Systems is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. Diversity and Inclusion is a business imperative and is a part of building our brand and reputation. At Applied, we don’t discriminate, and we are committed to recruit, develop, retain, and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, age, veteran status, and other protected status as required by applicable law.

Apply for this job online

Submit Referral Here

job.title: MERN Stack Developer @ Sarvadhi Solutions Pvt. Ltd (GJ, IN)
job.description:
We are looking for a passionate and self-driven **MERN Stack Developer** with strong technical fundamentals, problem-solving skills, and an ownership mindset. The ideal candidate should be comfortable working independently, communicating effectively, and leveraging AI tools to improve development productivity and software quality.

* Develop and maintain scalable web applications using the MERN stack.

* Build responsive, user-friendly, and high-performance applications.

* Design and integrate REST APIs and third-party services.

* Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize application performance.

* Understand business requirements and deliver quality solutions.

* Collaborate effectively with team members and clients.

* Follow coding standards, version control, and development best practices.

### **Requirements**

* 1-2 years of hands-on experience with **MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js**.

* Strong knowledge of **JavaScript (ES6+)**; TypeScript is a plus.

* Good understanding of HTML5, CSS3, Responsive Design, and React component architecture.

* Experience building REST APIs and integrating third-party APIs.

* Strong debugging, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis skills.

* Good understanding of Git and collaborative development workflows.

* Basic knowledge of SQL databases, cloud platforms, or Docker is an advantage.

* Comfortable using AI tools such as **ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot**, or similar platforms for requirement analysis, planning, coding, debugging, documentation, testing, and learning.

* Ability to review, validate, and improve AI-generated code rather than relying on it blindly.

**Preferred Qualification**

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

If you’re passionate about building quality software, enjoy solving challenging problems, and want to grow in an AI-first engineering environment, we’d love to hear from you.

job.title: Full Stack - Principal Engineer @ Dell Technologies (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Full Stack - Principal Engineer**

Be a part of a team that’s ensuring Dell Technologies' product integrity and customer satisfaction. Our IT Software Engineer team turns business requirements into technology solutions by designing, coding and testing/debugging applications, as well as documenting procedures for use and constantly seeking quality improvements.

**What you’ll achieve:**

As a Principal, you will design and implement critical services, lead complex refactors, and champion quality. You will collaborate across teams to resolve dependencies and raise the bar for performance and reliability.

Join us to do the best work of your career and make a profound social impact as a **Full Stack -Principal Engineer** on our **Software Engineer-IT** team.

**You will:**

* Design, develop, and maintain full stack applications using **Angular**, **JavaScript**, and related frontend technologies. Build scalable, maintainable, and reliable application components across frontend, backend, and database layers
* Work with database technologies such as **MS SQL Server** and **PostgreSQL**. Build and improve **CI/CD pipelines** for application and operations workflows
* Diagnose and resolve complex application, infrastructure, and production issues.
* Establish and follow best practices for reliability, observability, maintainability, and production support
* Leverage **AI coding assistants, agents, and modern IDEs** to improve developer productivity, quality, and delivery velocity

**Take the first step towards your dream career**

Every Dell Technologies team member brings something unique to the table. Here’s what we are looking for with this role:

**Essential Requirements**

* 10+ years of professional experience in **software engineering, full stack development, or IT systems delivery**
* Strong experience in **frontend development** using **Angular** and **JavaScript**
* Experience with backend application development and system integration using **Java**/**Python** and database technologies such as **MS SQL Server** and **PostgreSQL**
* Experience using **AI-assisted coding tools** such as coding assistants, agents, and modern IDE integrations
* Proven experience with **Git** and collaborative development practices. Experience building or working with **CI/CD pipelines**

**Desirable Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree

**Who We Are**

We believe that each of us has the power to make an impact. That’s why we put our team members at the center of everything we do. If you’re looking for an opportunity to grow your career with some of the best minds and most advanced tech in the industry, we’re looking for you.

Dell Technologies is a unique family of businesses that helps individuals and organizations transform how they work, live and play. Join us to build a future that works for everyone because Progress Takes All of Us.  
  
Dell Technologies is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. **Read the full Equal Employment Opportunity Policy**.

Visit our ***Culture Code*** page to learn more about how we work and lead.

job.title: Senior Technical Specialist - .Net, Azure, C# @ HCLTech (TN, IN)
job.description:
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
  
Build and enhance enterprise .NET applications using AI-assisted development (Claude) to
  
improve productivity, code quality, and delivery speed
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Develop backend/full stack features using .NET (C#, ASP.NET Core)
  

* Work with existing enterprise codebases
* Use Claude for coding, debugging, and optimization
* Implement APIs and integrations
* Contribute to code quality and reviews

Skill Requirements
  
  
Must-Have Skills
  

* 5–10+ years software development
* Strong .NET skills (C#, ASP.NET Core, APIs)
* Experience with enterprise applications

job.description:
Noida, Uttar Pradesh
  
Job Summary
  
Role Summary
  
  
Full Stack Developer who can design, develop, and deliver high‑quality software solutions across the full technology stack. This role requires strong technical expertise, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams. You will lead development initiatives, mentor junior engineers, and play a key role in shaping technical architecture and engineering best practices
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Key Responsibilities

* 5–8 years of Fullstack or application engineering experience.

job.title: Full Stack @ EXL Service (HR, IN)
job.description:
Job Description: We are seeking a highly capable and experienced technology professional with strong expertise across application development, data architecture, infrastructure, and solution delivery. The ideal candidate will bring a deep understanding of modern enterprise technology ecosystems spanning .NET/.NET Core, Python, data platforms, cloud and on-prem infrastructure, SDLC/DevOps practices, along with a sound understanding of the insurance industry. This role requires a hands-on, solution-oriented individual who can work in fast-paced environments and contribute to the design and delivery of scalable, robust, and agile technology solutions.

  

* Responsibilities: Design, develop, and support enterprise-grade applications using .NET, .NET Core, and Python, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and performance.
* Define and implement robust application architecture patterns aligned with business, security, and operational requirements.
* Lead the design of modern data architectures, including relational databases, NoSQL/document stores, star schemas, data lakes, and streaming data pipelines.
* Translate business and technical requirements into end-to-end solution designs that integrate application, data, and infrastructure components effectively.
* Provide guidance on infrastructure topologies for both on-premises and cloud-based environments, including virtual machines, containers, Kubernetes/AKS, and Azure-native services.
* Drive adoption of strong SDLC and DevOps practices, including CI/CD, code quality controls, release automation, environment management, and agile delivery methodologies.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams including business stakeholders, architects, developers, data engineers, and operations teams to deliver high-quality technology solutions.
* Ensure solutions are designed with appropriate focus on resilience, scalability, security, and operational efficiency.
* Troubleshoot complex technical issues across application, data, and infrastructure layers, and provide practical resolution approaches.
* Work effectively in high-pressure environments, managing multiple priorities while maintaining delivery quality and timeliness.

Leverage industry knowledge to align technology solutions with insurance domain requirements, processes, and business objectives.

  

* Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* Strong hands-on experience in application development using .NET, .NET Core, and Python with 6-10 years of industry experience
* Deep knowledge of data technologies and architectures, including:
  + Relational databases
  + Document-oriented / NoSQL databases
  + Dimensional modeling / star schemas
  + Data lakes
  + Streaming and event-driven data architectures
* Strong understanding of infrastructure design and deployment topologies across both on-premises and cloud environments.
* Experience working with virtual machines, containerized platforms, Kubernetes/AKS, and Microsoft Azure services.
* Sound knowledge of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and modern DevOps practices, including agile delivery, CI/CD pipelines, automated deployments, and version control.
* Ability to design and build fast, agile, and robust enterprise solutions with a strong engineering mindset.
* Demonstrated ability to work effectively under pressure in demanding delivery environments.
* Good understanding of the insurance industry, including domain processes, systems, and business context.
* Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills with the ability to engage both technical and business stakeholders.

job.title: AI Full Stack Engineer - AI Platform @ Teradata (IN)
job.description:
**Our Company:**

At Teradata, we believe that people thrive when empowered with better information. Teradata Autonomous Knowledge Platform activates enterprise intelligence by unifying data, knowledge and business context to achieve tangible outcomes. With Teradata, organizations can provide agents with full context for impact when it matters. Our solution lets businesses connect and scale on premises, in the cloud, or through a hybrid approach. Teradata delivers real business value with AI.

**What You'll Do**

We are looking for senior software engineers who will have front end responsibilities to deliver great customer with services to support the UI, developer and operational-user experiences for our Teradata Cloud Platform and ecosystem components. In this role, you will work closely with Cloud Services, Platform, and Infrastructure teams to gain a deeper understanding of different persona-based use-cases and drive development of feature-sets that provide administration, monitoring and operational capabilities in a self-service and managed offerings model in a multi-tenant console dashboard.

This role reports to the Senior Manager of engineering, User Platform team.

**Key Responsibilities**

Lead architecture and development of scalable full-stack systems, delivering high-quality customer-facing applications using React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks.

Design and build distributed backend services and APIs using Node.js, Java, or Python to support frontend applications and AI-powered capabilities.

Drive adoption of AI-assisted development workflows, including translating AI-generated prototypes into production-grade software and improving developer productivity through modern tooling.

Design and implement AI-powered features and agent-based systems, integrating LLM-driven capabilities into product experiences.

Lead system design for large-scale applications, ensuring performance, reliability, and maintainability across services and platforms.

Provide technical leadership across teams, mentoring engineers, guiding architectural decisions, and establishing best practices.

Partner with product, design, and cross-functional teams to rapidly prototype, iterate, and ship impactful features in a fast-paced environment.

Evaluate and integrate emerging technologies, particularly in AI, developer tooling, and platform capabilities

Hands-on experience with **Machine learning & deep learning frameworks**: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn

Hands-on experience with **LLMs**, agent frameworks (LangChain, AutoGPT, ReAct, etc.), and orchestration tools.

What Makes You A Qualified Candidate

4+ years of software engineering experience building large-scale applications.

Strong expertise in modern frontend development with React and JavaScript/TypeScript.

Experience building full-stack applications with scalable backend services.

Backend experience with Python, Go and Java

Familiarity with containerized environments (**Docker**, **Kubernetes**) and CI/CD pipelines.

Experience with **AI observability** tools and practices (e.g., logging, monitoring, tracing, metrics for AI agents or ML models).

Demonstrated experience designing distributed systems and APIs.

Experience working in fast-paced product development environments.

Strong ability to lead technical initiatives across multiple teams.

What You'll Bring

Strong knowledge in writing Automated Test Suites using frameworks like Jasmine, Protractor, Mocha, Cypress, Jest, or Selenium

Good working knowledge on Java/Python and experience with development

Familiarity with TDD and concepts like mocking and stubbing for unit / integration tests.

Thrive in an environment that requires you to partner with multiple cross-functional teams as stakeholders/customers

A proactive and solution-oriented mindset with a passion for technology and continuous learning

Great oral and written communication skills

#LI-VB1

Why We Think You’ll Love Teradata We prioritize a people-first culture because we know our people are at the very heart of our success. We embrace a flexible work model because we trust our people to make decisions about how, when, and where they work. We focus on well-being because we care about our people and their ability to thrive both personally and professionally. We are committed to actively working to foster an inclusive environment that celebrates people for all of who they are.

job.title: Full stack Developer @ BCE Global Technology Centre (KA, IN)
job.description:
#### **Who are we:**

At BCE Global Tech we are on a mission to modernize global connectivity, one connection at a time. We aim to build the highway to the future of communications, media and entertainment, determined to emerge as a powerhouse within the technology landscape in India team in Bengaluru.

We bring ambitions to life through design thinking that bridges the gaps between people, devices and beyond, fostering unprecedented customer satisfaction through technology.

Our core values support a customer-centric approach and the harnessing of cutting-edge technology to provide business outcomes with positive societal impact. Guided by innovation and a commitment to progress, we’re shaping a brighter future for the generations of today and tomorrow.

If you would like to be a part of a team of thought-leaders pioneering advancements in 5G, MEC, IoT and cloud-native architecture, we’d love to hear from you.

#### **Job Description:**

Responsible for developing full stack software solutions using JavaScript frameworks. Ensure high-quality code, contribute to testing frameworks, and collaborate with team members to deliver robust applications.

**Key Responsibilities:**

  

* Develop software with good velocity and apply good practices and design patterns.
* Contribute to the testing framework and achieve over 80% code coverage.
* Maintain up-to-date documentation.
* Conduct peer code reviews and support continuous improvement.

**Qualifications**:

  

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science or related field.
* Having 5 to 8 years experience in JavaScript/TypeScript development (NodeJS, React).
* Experience in DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines.
* Experience in cloud platforms (AWS, Docker, OpenShift).
* DevOps practices and CI/CD.
* Cloud and containerization technologies.

**Skills**:

NodeJs with Javascript

#### **What We Offer:**

* Competitive salaries and comprehensive health benefits
* Flexible work hours and remote work options
* Professional development and training opportunities
* A supportive and inclusive work environment
* Access to cutting-edge technology and tools
